name: PURE CYCLE CORP
summary: Pure Cycle Corporation is a diversified water and wastewater service provider, land developer, and single-family home rental company operating in the Denver, Colorado area. It provides wholesale water and wastewater services through the Rangeview Metropolitan District, develops its 930-acre Sky Ranch master planned community along the I-70 corridor into residential and commercial lots, and owns 14 single-family rental homes with plans to expand to over 200 units.
